{{CargoRelic
|name=Fireflower
|class_id=20013
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=When digging in the Fissure, the snail encountered a grumpy plumber. He jumped right up and tried to stomp on the snail's shell without a word! After teaching him a fatal lesson, the snail found a fire flower on his body, which he seemed to have taken great care of.
|fame=13
|art=28
|fth=18
|civ=18
|tech=13
|ss1=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +10<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss2=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +20<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss3=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +30<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss4=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +30<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200
|ss7=Per 30 Fissure Floors, Snail HP +30<br>Fissure Floor: 1200/1200<br> (Awakened)
}}
